content: WXT is the recommended MV3 extension framework for new projects in 2025/2026: actively developed, Vite-based, framework-agnostic (React/Vue/Svelte), cross-browser, Nuxt-like conventions with auto-imports. Plasmo has slowed maintenance (stalled Parcel dependency risk). CRXJS is a Vite plugin (not framework), recently revived, best HMR for content scripts. Consensus recommendation: WXT.
